title: Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read property 'match' of undefined
author: nextdooroldwang

comments.author: rrrnld
comments.body:
I am facing the same issue on node v13.1.0, but only with some `*.xlsx` files. The stacktrace looks like this:
```
TypeError: Cannot read property 'match' of undefined
    at Object.decodeEx (/home/heyarne/example/node_modules/exceljs/lib/utils/col-cache.js:158:26)
    at /home/heyarne/example/node_modules/exceljs/lib/xlsx/xform/book/workbook-xform.js:181:34
    at Array.forEach (<anonymous>)
    at Object.each (/home/heyarne/example/node_modules/exceljs/lib/utils/under-dash.js:5:13)
    at WorkbookXform.reconcile (/home/heyarne/example/node_modules/exceljs/lib/xlsx/xform/book/workbook-xform.js:174:7)
    at XLSX.reconcile (/home/heyarne/example/node_modules/exceljs/lib/xlsx/xlsx.js:82:19)
    at ZipReader.<anonymous> (/home/heyarne/example/node_modules/exceljs/lib/xlsx/xlsx.js:343:14)
```

comments.author: fnaquira
comments.body: Did you manage to solve it?

comments.author: hansonGong
comments.body: Did you manage to solve it?

comments.body: same problem, but before my file was a xlsb and then i convert this in xlsx
